commit.message:
Fix bot 409 conflict: retry with backoff instead of crashing

When Telegram returns 409 (another getUpdates request), wait
5-30s and retry instead of crashing the process, which caused
Docker to instantly restart and repeat the conflict loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add YouTube auto-stop with Replay Line button

- SCENE_TIMES map with start/end seconds for all 12 scenes
- YT IFrame API integration: ytPlayer, ytApiReady, ytEndInterval state
- initYTPlayer(): creates or reloads YT.Player inside #videoFrame div
- startEndCheck(): polls getCurrentTime() every 250ms, pauses at end-1s
- Shows '↺ Replay Line' button after auto-pause; click rewinds to start
- openModal/closeModal/hearActor all use YT API (seekTo/playVideo/stopVideo)

commit.message:
Redesign Daily Challenge section with animated DC card and streak tracker

Daily Challenge Card:
- Animated gold shimmer border sweeping left-to-right (CSS keyframe)
- Gold radial glow behind card title
- ★ DAILY CHALLENGE gold badge + 2× POINTS orange badge header
- Movie title in Bebas Neue, italic quote, actor + difficulty badge
- Live HH:MM:SS countdown "New challenge in" to UTC midnight
- "Open Scene →" gold button wired to openModal()
- Green completion overlay animates in after daily submit or on page load
  when profile shows daily_done_today=true

Streak Card (right of DC card on desktop, stacked on mobile):
- 🔥 fire emoji with CSS flicker animation (scale + skewX + brightness)
- Large orange streak number in Bebas Neue
- 7-day dot row: each column shows day abbreviation + dot state
    empty = not completed, ✔ done (orange), ★ today (pulsing orange ring)
- Milestone message adapts to streak count and whether today is done

Layout: CSS grid 1fr/240px on desktop, single column on mobile

JS:
- renderDailyCard(), renderStreakCard(), streakMessage(), showDailyComplete()
- loadStreakCard() fetches /api/profile on boot/login/register
- showPointsEarned() calls showDailyComplete()+renderStreakCard() on daily submit
- startDailyCountdown() reloads both daily + streak at midnight

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: mirror-app
repository.description: English learning app through movie scenes

commit.message:
Fix Beds24 V1 error code handling: use String() comparison, add code 2002

- errorCode from Beds24 is inconsistently typed (string vs number), now
  uses String() for safe comparison
- 1002: API key not found (invalid key)
- 1003: API key unauthorized (regenerated or access revoked)
- 2002: Prop key not found in account (wrong prop_key)
- Returns errorCode in response for easier debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Daily Challenge feature with streak tracking

Backend:
- get_daily_scene_id(): MD5 hash of UTC date string → deterministic scene for all users
- GET /api/daily: returns scene, date, bonus_multiplier, secs_until_reset
- DB migration: users.streak INTEGER, users.last_daily TEXT
- POST /api/submit: detects daily scene, awards 2× points, updates streak
  (streak increments if last_daily = yesterday, resets to 1 otherwise)
  returns is_daily, daily_bonus, daily_already_done, streak
- GET /api/leaderboard: includes streak per user row
- GET /api/profile: includes streak, daily_done_today, daily_scene_id

Frontend:
- Daily bar above scene grid: scene name + live HH:MM:SS countdown to UTC midnight
- Countdown auto-reloads daily data when it hits 00:00:00
- Gold "DAILY CHALLENGE" badge on the matching scene card
- "★ Daily · 2× pts" pill in recording modal header
- Points panel shows daily bonus amount + 🔥 N-day streak on completion
- Leaderboard: 🔥N streak badge next to username
- My Progress: streak shown in division card

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct GameCompleted event signature to include uint64 timestamp

Contract emits GameCompleted(address,uint32,uint32,uint64) with timestamp,
but ABI and topic0 only had 3 params. Updated both constants.ts and the
leaderboard topic0 hash — this was causing all event log queries to return 0 results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(lint): avoid unused destructured variable in modes-store

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix SSH key permissions on Windows (NTFS/icacls)

chmod 600 alone does not set NTFS ACLs, causing SSH to reject the key
with "Permission denied". Added secure_key() helper that uses icacls.exe
on Windows to remove inherited permissions and grant access only to the
current user. Falls back to chmod on Linux/Mac.

commit.message:
Epic 273A: Docker Compose Gateway Integration (#528)

* feat(epic-273A): Docker Compose gateway integration

Add Spring Cloud Gateway BFF as a Docker Compose service with OIDC
connection to Keycloak, session storage in Postgres, and API proxy
to backend. Update dev-up.sh to start and health-check the gateway.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: align KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID default to gateway-bff

The Keycloak realm export defines the client as gateway-bff, but
docker-compose.yml and .env.example defaulted to docteams-web.
This mismatch would cause OAuth2 login failures at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add refine_frame0.py — Stage 1 rigid refinement of foreground placement

Optimises 7 parameters (axis-angle Δr, translation Δt, log-scale Δs) as
small corrections on top of the coarse placement.json, using photometric
L1 loss against a reference frame. Optional silhouette BCE, Marigold depth,
and Flux pseudo-GT losses are also supported.

Outputs placement_refined.json (with rotation baked in as a 3×3 matrix)
and validation images (rendered | reference | colourised depth) every N steps.

Also updates create_composite_4dgs.py to accept --placement_path and read
rotation directly from the JSON if present, skipping COLMAP recomputation.

in REM comments caused cmd.exe parsing errors on some Windows machines.
Replace with ASCII-only comments and plain setlocal.

aprender's apr-cli depends on unpublished APIs from entrenar/realizar/

fix: ポラロイド動画のプリロードを廃止（ブラウザフリーズの原因）

46テクスチャの同期一括プリロードがブラウザのメインスレッドを
数秒間ブロックし「応答なし」フリーズを引き起こしていた。

制御を返すことでフリーズを解消。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix sysext services not starting at boot

Two issues prevented kernel module services from activating after reboot:

1. systemd scans unit files before sysext merge, so services inside the
   sysext (broadcom-wl, battery-load, facetimehd-load, etc.) were invisible
   when the boot transaction was computed. Install a systemd-sysext.service
   drop-in that runs daemon-reload after merge (to discover the units) then
   re-triggers default.target (to enqueue the newly visible services).

2. broadcom-wl and facetimehd services referenced /sbin/modprobe which
   doesn't exist on KDE Linux — changed to /usr/bin/modprobe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Mute RX audio during TX to prevent echo on ECHO CAT

The radio's audio input captures the output device (which is playing
the phone mic audio back), creating a feedback loop where the operator
hears themselves. Mute the <audio> element on PTT start, unmute on
PTT stop. Covers all RX paths: normal release, server-forced RX,
PTT timeout, and emergency stop.

Fix dev mode stale bundles and agent pane connectivity (#6)

* chore: bump version to 0.31.24

build for agent pane testing

* fix: dev mode stale bundles and agent pane connectivity

- Fix agent pane not receiving output: subscribe to "term" file subject
  instead of "claude-code.jsonl" (backend always writes PTY to "term")
- Fix schema endpoint 401s: add authkey query param to /schema/* fetches
- Fix window show error: getCurrent() → getCurrentWindow() for Tauri v2
- Prevent stale production bundles in dev mode:
  - Delete dist/frontend/ in beforeDevCommand
  - Disable WebView2 HTTP cache in debug builds
  - Clear WebView2 cache dir on dev startup
  - Add DEV/PRODUCTION console banner in bootstrap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: bump version to 0.31.25

fix dev mode stale bundles and agent pane bugs

* fix: move custom-protocol to feature gate for proper dev mode loading

The `custom-protocol` feature was hardcoded in the tauri dependency
features, causing the webview to always load from `frontendDist`
(production bundle) instead of `devUrl` (Vite dev server) during
`tauri dev`. Moving it to a Cargo feature gate allows `tauri dev`
to exclude it via `--no-default-features`, so the webview correctly
loads from `http://localhost:5173` with HMR support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address ReAgent review feedback on lib.rs

- Wrap std::env::set_var in unsafe block (deprecated in Rust 2024)
- Narrow WebView2 cache clearing to Windows-only with target_os cfg

commit.message:
Fix PDF attachment not being sent in booking confirmation emails

The issue was that clearAttachments() was being called in send() BEFORE
the email was sent, which removed the PDF attachment that had just been added.

Changes:
- Move clearAttachments() to AFTER email is sent in send() method
- Add clearAttachments() at start of sendBookingConfirmation() to clean up
  any previous attachments before adding new PDF
- This ensures PDF is attached when email is sent

Now booking confirmation emails will include the PDF attachment as intended.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
